park_name: BIG4 Port Douglas Glengarry Holiday Park

reviews.review_text: Lovely caravan park with a well-equipped camp kitchen, friendly and helpful staff, and great swimming facilities. It had everything we needed for an easy and enjoyable night of camping. Highly Recommend.
Great for young kids, staff tried to get our group close together for us. Super helpful. Camp kitchen and amenities nice and clean

Very helpful staff when we called up at the last minute to book an ensuite site. Great location and great amenities on site. Even a lady there who offers home-cooked for meals! Just outside port Douglas so very handy for there.

Very helpful staff when we called up at the last minute to book an ensuite site. Great location and great amenities on site. Even a lady there who offers home-cooked for meals! Just outside port Douglas so very handy for there.

Friendly staff, beautiful place, very nice area for the kids amusement even though on this trip it was only the wife and I.  Extremely clean showers and restrooms. The staff was very helpful with recommendations

Parking at reception had plenty of room. Easter hunt was fun for the entire family.  Size of park made it easier to get to bathrooms and reception. Highly recommend this stay.  My daughter enjoyed hours of fun on water slides, jumping pillow and the play equipment

Lovely quiet, well maintained park about 10mins out of town. Reception and all groundsmen helpful and friendly . Refreshing pool and waterpark for kids with numerous slides. Cabins quiet, especially up the back of the park and most private with scenic mountain views. No pay tv and very little internet signal around park so bring a book or two to read.
Absolutely enjoying our stay at this park. It is very well run and friendly.  Thanks

"I recently stayed at BIG4 Port Douglas Glengarry Holiday Park and wanted to share my thoughts. The two-bedroom villa was comfortable, and the location was convenient for exploring Port Douglas and cape tribulation.. The swimming pool and waterpark were a hit with my family, and the kids enjoyed the jumping pillow and pedal carts. The ground staff were friendly.|However, there were some issues that detracted from our stay. I found it unusual to have staff swimming in the pool after hours, and one staff member even took it upon themselves to enforce pool rules while off-duty, which made the kids a bit uncomfortable. They were climbing the rocks though. Rather than correct the behavior he went on a bit to much,. Reception staff often seemed too busy to acknowledge me promptly, and I had to wait five to 10 minutes while they finished phone calls with no other staff available to assist.|Phone reception was very poor throughout the park, and Wi-Fi was only available near reception, which wasn't convenient for our villa location. The park itself could do with some upgrades to bring it up to scratch.|Overall, it was an enjoyable stay, but I wouldn't return due to these issues, especially as a BIG4 member expecting a higher standard."
Understanding, friendly and accommodating.

The park has long term residents whose areas are not maintained, driving past their area to get to the cabins looks like a dump and is very off-putting. The cabins are exactly how they look in the photos although ours had mould on the walls in the shower and mould on the bathroom ceiling. We were only given 2 towels for 3 people (that's fine, we usually bring extra towels). There's no complimentary shampoo/conditioner (which is fine), make sure to bring your own. Staff were friendly and personable, the rest of the park was very well maintained. The children loved the water park, pool and jumping pillow. The park is only a 3 minute drive to a petrol station & 10 minute drive to restaurants. Overall it was okay and the kids enjoyed it.
Massive sites in comparison to some of the other Big4’s we’ve stayed at! Great service, awesome pool, waterpark and kids areas! Definitely be back

We stayed at Glengary caravan park for six weeks .This is absolutely the best caravan park we have stayed at.All the staff are so friendly and lovely, especially Lisa, Jason, Cal and Rumer great pool and fantastic water park for the kids. The camp kitchen is huge and a great set up and absolutely spotlessThe park is so well maintained, the guys do a fantastic job maintaining the park We highly recommended this park , the sites are a good size with palms in between each site .We give it a rating of 10 stars.
A good spot to explore Port Douglas & surrounds from ,lovely tropical gardens 🌴🌴🌴clean amenities 🚻heated swimming pool 🌺🦋🌸lovely memories of trips here in june/July

We were created and shown to our spot by the groundman. what a great introduction to the park. Vey clean and great amenities. we had a grass site and was surrounded by plants and trees. great Caravan Park.
Very friendly staff. Generous van sites. Lovely grounds

We were given a choice of sites  and chose a beautiful one just inside the driveway...it was lush and peaceful..there,was a small walk to the amenities and the pool that were cleaned every day..the office staff were very helpful as was the groundsman..we loved it here.

Prachtige camping met schone toiletten / douches en goede schone werkende keuken!! BBQ was geweldig en werkte perfect. Omgeving met geweldige tropisch bomen en uitzicht. Grote plaatsen met alle voorzieningen.

Cant rate the rooms as we just booked a powered site .
Staff . Location.  Amenities . Waterpark. Atmosphere.
10/10
Kids loved it will make be coming back .
Thanks
Looooooooove staying here have stayed a few times now on our travels from Brisbane and it is always fantastic thank you so much guys!!!

We had an ensuite powered slab site.  Didn't feel cramped and the ensuite was clean.  It was a good size and basically one big wetroom with shower toilet and basin.|Staff friendly, site quiet and inside the pick up area of our GBR trip which helped as well.

Very friendly and tidy. Kids loved the swimming pool and playground. Plenty of wildlife on the premises. I personally loved the concert given by the birds in the morning. We cooked in the communal kitchen, which was also very clean.
Great spot for a short stay, very kid friendly!! Staff are super friendly.  Only let down they should have cafe by the pool.  Overall stay thoroughly enjoyable !!

4.5/5 overall. 5/5 for staff and service. 4/5 location. Recommend. Great experience. Really friendly staff. Clean park and facilities. Does get hot in late sep/oct in day but cool at night.  10-15min drive to port isnt far but a little inconvenient. Overall 4.5/5 would be 5 but for the 10-15min drive to town, no air con tv room and price. Was a little pricey 90+ for powered site when places on beach are 40 ish albeit with much less facilities. We did really enjoy our stay and would recommend paying the extra price for the waterpark and bigger facilities overall closer to port options. If you got an air con cabin/van the experience would be better at hottest points of day 10:00am-3:30pm. However, you can cool off in the pool and water park that kids absolutely loved. My phone wouldn't let me give 4.5 star so opted for 5. We do hope to visit again!
Been visiting for 23 years for winter stay of a few months along with many others from the south of Oz
Great location but away from the city centre. About 7 or 8 kms to it.
We love coming back to Big 4 Glengarry. The staff are so pleasant and the park is beautiful, tropical, quiet and amenities spotless. The site for our van was excellent. We will be back.
Second time I’ve stayed here absolutely love it
What a great park. The amenities and kitchen were spotlessly clean. Good sized camping areas. A warm and friendly lady welcomed us. Will definitely stay again when in the area.
run down park in need of maintenance the owner max hates older kids and yeah we also know people who have a similar experience and yeah 2/10 wouldn't recommend at all.
LOVED THIS SITE!! We felt safe, lots of other campers (which made it feel cosy). Cooking amenities great! Toilets/ showered VERY clean. Safe for children. My favourite site so far!! 10/10
We had a caravan on site. Loved it.
Good campsite clean facilities and close to port douglas
Fabulous camping facilities,  spotless amenities, not one thing to pick at, lovely friendly staff all round great experience 😀

Very nice camping, the kids enjoyed the swimming pool and the slides, very clean kitchen and bathrooms. Nice team who has arranged last minute booking for two Camping cars despite busy season pick: thank you. We could enjoy lively Port Douglas at night and spend a day on the the great coral reef, snorkling, great memories !

Stayed here for 2 weeks during school holidays, which was our bad. Can't complain about that. However I would have thought the heating for the pool would have been on. Went up 3 times, only to have to get out, as the water was too cold. My main complaint however is the internet reception, or should I say, lack of. Phone coverage was fine, but there was nil internet, which was difficult when you want to plan your sightseeing the night before, but can't google anything. You get a wifi code on your park map, however this is non existent and the staff confirmed this when I asked. I'm not sure why they give a code. Very deceptive. Being so close to town I never imagined not having any internet. I am sure this can be fixed, but the park won't pay for it. Was a long 2 weeks! The other problem is the toilet is in the shower, so people are expected to mop the floor after showering, which of course doesn't happen, making floor wet and dangerous. There are other stand alone toilets, but these were locked the first couple of days when we arrived. Wouldn't recommend this park.

Decent facilities, good play area for kids, a fair variety of sites and accommodation options. Very crowded during peak period, and sites close together. Lots of noise through the nights- many guests had no respect for the time. Dumping bags of glass in the bin at midnight was surprisingly common. Lots of unsupervised youths running through other people's sites as well.

Great location and would return, but definitely not during peak season.

We loved this place ! The staff were helpful, the place was great! The only reason I'm giving 4 stars are the waterslides are not the best, one knocks you around as you go down. It is probably only because we came from the ones at coconut in Cairns which my daughter loved and went non-stop. Once down these and she didn't really want any more. So overall yes I recommend it's a lovely park. They even had a coffee van making exceptional brews in the morning.
Needs paper towel and liquid soap in camp kitchen and washrooms
Fantastic friendly staff.  Wonderful place to stay

Bloody fantastic - a little slice of heaven. Fabulous atmosphere. Beautiful surrounds. Tons of fun for the kids - they all end up making little friends. Cabins had everything we needed. Wendy on the front desk is a legend. Can’t wait to come back!
Camping bellissimo, vicino alla città. Ci siamo fermati 2 settimane.

Booked this park through big4. To our dismay you are crammed in like sardines.  Not enough toilet and shower facilities or laundry equipment.  We have travelled all the way up the east coast on our around Australia loop. This would be the worst Big4 we have stayed in. We are checking out in the morning and are so happy to move on.  Bad choice for us.. Don't be deceived by the photos on the website. Happy travels. 😝🫢😮‍💨
Nice park, close to town. Facilities were clean and well serviced. Would recommend.

Great little park, staff were very welcoming and helpful.
The owners are
Lovely.

Good location approximately 15km from township, easy drive. Cabin was comfortable. Parking a little tight out front of end cabin as caravans trying to access site opposite had to request us to move. No blankets provided luckily for us we carried our own.
Was a pleasant stay pool was lovely
Fantastic
Really nice park, very welcoming owners and staff, very clean amenities, the whole area is well maintained, nice pool an children's play area.
If you're not a member.. you should be.  Amazing rates Amazing service  Amazing caravan park

We stayed here for 2 nights on our way up to the Cape. The management were super friendly and the park was absolutely gorgeous. Amenities were great too. We'd stay again on our way back. Well done guys!

Great facilities for kids to roam and play with a waterpark and jumping air trampoline. Friendly staff and clean. The place looks tired in some areas and needs some work but still a great place to stay.
Great day out including day passes
Great caravan park for families. Well kept amenities, great pool and water park. We’ll be back.

Perfect getaway for families, facilities are amazing and so clean, water Park is awesome for kids and family.

Very well maintained caravan park

A great caravan park with large sites. Little to no telstra reception but that's no biggie. Great pool and splash park for the kids and clean amenities.

Would stay here again, but would be aiming for a site away from the main camp kitchen. Too much noise from social gatherings. Our last night, 40+ grey nomads having a function of some sort made it difficult for us to get our little one down to sleep.

Other than that, would be 5 stars. It's a great little park perfectly located.
Great park helpfully staff good water park
Friendly and accommodating staff ,preferred the overflow section  beautiful grassed area.

They jam you in pretty tight, not much room to move on most sites. No wifi and phone reception was just ok. At least they had tv cables at each site. Camp kitchen was great, the bathroom toilet combos were terrible, no screens, the whole floor got wet, exhaust fans did nothing .. won’t be back in a hurry

Super unfreundliche Mitarbeiter. Bei der Begrüßung erstmal angeschriehen worden weil wir 30 Sekunden in der falschen Spur standen bei der Anmeldung.

Selten solche unfreundlichen Leute kennengelernt… Lieber einen anderen Spot suchen!
Great caravan park. Very roomy and everything we needed close by
Nice park a bit to far out from town. But I would still stay there. Telstra reception is pretty poor there.

Amazing water park for the kids. We stayed in a cabin which was ok. Clean sheets but average clean on the rest of the cabin. Appreciated the proper shower mat. Good washing machine but would have liked access to an oven in the camp kitchen. Great little coffee can onsite.

Have to say it feels like a retirement village for grey nomad residents who have a local club going. Many vans are set in for the long term and aren't moving.

Annoyed as last night the park manager reversed a camper trailer so far into our space ethat when they opened batwing awning it was well and truly almost touching our van awning.

Great park with friendly service, good facilities and prices. Our powered site was pleasant, shaded and quiet. The main areas for improvement are condition of some facilities - sign out the front the light is out so difficult to find drive in the dark, toilet by the pool the door rotted and broken, shade sail over the bounce pillow is well overdue a clean. Park is generally clean and in decent repair but these few obvious things let it down. Baby bath only in women’s shower block, would be nice to have family bathrooms or more ensuite sites for families with young kids.
Brilliant coffee! Lovely quiet site. Great for kids.
I went to this water park with my son and I was surprised to find this place super fun and had a great selection of slides and water features. The coffee from the kiosk was also amazing

Eerst zochten we een camping in het centrum van Port Douglas, maar de campings daar waren zeer verouderd en slordig. Dit park is ook niet het nieuwste park, maar de voorzieningen zijn vrij goed. Het zwembadwater stonk wel. Advies aan camping om wat vernieuwingen aan te brengen. Verder prima.
Excellent
An sich ganz schöner Platz. Die Zimmer könnten etwas Erneuerung vertragen. Wasserspielplatz und Pool sind toll. Er liegt ca. 10 Fahrminuten außerhalb von Port Douglas.
Wouldn’t stay there again local permanent resident playing load music for 2 days very annoying

I only used the water park.
Day passes available at reception.
Receptionist very friendly and helpful.
Great waterpark for the kids plus a nice playground.
We had so much fun
Playground was very hot as there wasn't a shade cover.
Only bad thing, one small toilet and no changing rooms.
Buen sitio para pasar uno o varios días con tu camper. Tranquilo y con buenos servicios. Y la zona de Port Douglas da pie para realizar muchas actividades.
Goede plek om met kinderen te verblijven. Netjes onderhouden en goede service.

Nice park , clean and tidy. Just make sure they don’t give you a sight next to the food vans or Expect to be woken up at 6.45 am when they are setting up every morning , slamming draws n cupboards etc. then you will have to listen to every conversation untill coffees are made. Oh don’t forget when they wake you up at 4am when they pull food van out to set up at the port Douglas markets on sundays. They are also open on Friday nights. Worst sight we’ve had in 6 months of traveling so far.
Nice caravan park. Would stay again.

Good and bad. Great spot, water park is fun, staff are lovely, the grounds looked great and there is a little coffee van which is awesome, BUT the room in the villa was dusty and a bit dirty. I am asthmatic so I am very picky about cleanliness, especially dust, dirt and mould. The windowsills were so dusty in the room we were in and the windows were dirty as well as the blinds. I opened them up because that’s what I always do that at home to let fresh air get through. The bathroom had some mould as well. Although it wasn’t a deal breaker, I expect more from accommodation that is paid for.  Besides that everything else was clean.

Excellent place to stay with kids. The kids had a great time in the pool and the water play area. Beautiful cabins, not sure as noisy as they can be at other places.
You would benefit from a car as it is roughly a ten minute drive from the town.
bathrooms are abit smelly, all lights are yellow so when you go out at night its just yellow, slides are kind is dangerous and do smell like pee but everything else is pretty good
Only paid for a day pass. The kids enjoyed the pool and outdoor play areas.

Good place to stay with the family. Pool area gets super busy and the waterpark pump broke down a few times but still great. Not far from Port Douglas town centre (about 10-15 minute drive). We stayed in a two bedroom cabin and it was very good. Clean and everything we needed.

We went to the water park . Which is smallish. The operators make you sign a legal waiver for children using the park, to negate liability. There is one pool which is very deep 1.9m at the deep end, there is a water slide which dumps users at the deep end, over 1.8m deep. There are no warning signs on either the slide or pool about the deep water. I had to help a couple of little kids who went down the slide and ended up under the water and couldn't swim . There are no life guards at pool or park, or warning signs. the park does provide a pile of pool noodles which the kids can use.
A fun day but serious safety concerns.

Edit- Additional
I think what was most concerning about this about 2 months prior to our visit there was near drowning at the park in the same pool. A 3 year old girl was pulled out of the water unconscious by a 5 year old girl. The 3 year old was revived and an ambulance attended. The park well aware of this situation and kept the slide open and added no warning signs or additional signage in January when we visited. While I was there I assisted a number of small children who went down the slide and ended up under the water struggling in water well over their heads.
Very helpful and friendly staff can’t do enough for you. Thanks so much we will be back for sure.
Fantastic park with beautiful gardens and great views.  Thanks guys for finding us such a perfect site for our large van.
We stayed here for three nights. Clean facilities. Enjoyed the stay.
Wonderfull campsite with a lovely pool with slides for the children.

Staff was really wonderful - last minute request for a site after hours, only reached at 7pm but she was really friendly and attended to us after her dinner and gave us several options for sites depending on lighting, size and our needs. Good, clean facilities and large camp kitchen, everything you need a for a pleasant stay.

We booked our stay in “Port Douglas” at this park about 3 / 4 weeks in advance.. (it’s a 10 min drive to Port Douglas).
On arrival I overhead a conversation with another customer complaining about how wet the sites were. (We have had a bit of rain in the area, not unusual for this part of Aus). My initial thoughts were I can’t stand people complaining about rain, however on arrival to our site - it was a MUD Pit. In all honesty, it should not have been available. We avoided parking out the front to try help it dry out but in three days (with sun), it did not dry out.
Our young children could not play outside as the mud seeped through the TWO mats we had put down - not ideal for a few night stay. I was walking around in gumboots to avoid slipping over.
We were parked near the road - which bears minimal security. The walk to amenities is about 250mtrs (up a hill) which was not suitable with a 3YO and 1YO at bathtime (through slippery mud)..
We were in site 68 for reference - and all  sites nearby to this one get all the rain run off from the park above.
Some amenities did not have hand soap (with a toilet?).

The little coffee van near reception does boast good coffee however.

I rely on these reviews when making my own bookings - it’s important for transparency. I’ve taken a few photos of the direct entry to our site FYI.

Don’t stay on Thursday nights. This is the worse camping ground for noise we have ever stayed in. The site hosts a weekly dinner for old noisey cackling people who didn’t respect the 10pm curfew by hours.
Great park, had a fantastic sire on both visits in the last month. Amenities excellent and cleaned regularly.
Sites very small and difficult to access. park is 7 kilometres out of town very open park
Great park
Lovely park for a family holiday. Friendly staff. Clean amenities and sites.
We got a day pass to the water park. Kids loved it. Money we’ll spent.
A lovely place to stay.
Our third time here clean and tidy staff very friendly powered and unpowered sites
Great park nice n shady

Nice clean and tidy caravan, clean amenities but the ones that were near our site needed a freshen up, was a bit of a let down considering the price that they charge for the park. OK but could improve.

Well kept gardens and pool area. Villa units are a  premium  price  for average accomodation and require updating . .Rather disappointed in the cleanliness of the lounge area of the villa, which was rectified after staff were advised.
,
Great campsite with enough space! Super clean facility, friendly guests and very helpful staff. Thank you for the great stay.
It's very good it's a nice lovely place
